User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block admin and account pages from indexing
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /account/login
Disallow: /account/register
Disallow: /account/profile
Disallow: /cart

# Allow product and shop pages
Allow: /shop
Allow: /product/
Allow: /categories
Allow: /blog

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://luxtronics.in/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://luxtronics.com.au/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://luxtronics.co.nz/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (be nice to server)
Crawl-delay: 1
